clubs.name: Community Garden Corps
clubs.description: Community Garden Corps tends the campus garden and donates fresh produce to a local food bank. Members learn sustainable growing practices while giving back to neighbours in need.

clubs.name: Peer Tutoring Network
clubs.description: The Peer Tutoring Network pairs upper-year students with classmates who want extra support in math, science, and writing. Every session is free and welcoming.

clubs.name: Senior Companions Club
clubs.description: Senior Companions Club visits a nearby retirement residence to share music, games, and conversation. Members build lasting friendships across generations.

clubs.name: Coastal Cleanup Crew
clubs.description: Coastal Cleanup Crew organizes monthly litter cleanups along local waterways and tracks the impact of its work. The club also runs waste-reduction campaigns on campus.
